creator: astrotechdroidmrusli@gmail.com
text:
Hi Joseph Mingrone,

I have change the freebsd ports to the latest updates instead of quarterly basis.
And I do a check on the packages. 

I still have the Chromium patch 2 not patch 3 yet. 

Is there a way I can get the latest patch 3 that you said. 

How do i get this thing to work. 

Please let me know. ASAP. 

Thank you.

Very much appreciate your kind help.
